top_signals.title: Copper Retreats as Traders Weigh Prospects of US-Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Copper fell as traders waited to see whether a fragile ceasefire in the Middle East can turn into a peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vietnam’s Convicted Mogul Repays $455 Million to Bondholders
top_signals.summary: Vietnam real estate tycoon Truong My Lan, convicted in the nation’s largest fraud case, has repaid a total of more than 12 trillion dong ($455 million) to about 42,000 bond holders as the government works to clawback billions of ill-gotten gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Polymarket moves to list parlays while SEC seeks public input on prediction market ETFs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Deere Gets Lift From Construction as Farmers Still Struggle
top_signals.summary: Deere & Co. is getting a boost from its construction and forestry segments, helping to offset volatile agriculture markets that continue to crimp farmer spending.

top_signals.title: Is gas making a comeback on the US power grid?
top_signals.summary: Surging energy demand causes grid operators to prioritise fossil fuels

top_signals.title: Walmart issues worse-than-expected outlook as high gas prices hit shoppers
top_signals.summary: Walmart's fiscal first-quarter earnings report will offer Wall Street a unique view into the health of the U.S. economy
